ddls:
CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the website */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the website */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Content type of the website (e.g., static, dynamic) */,
  "server_type" TEXT /* Server type used by the website (e.g., Apache, Nginx) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used by the website (e.g., React, Angular) */,
  "monitoring_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency at which the website is monitored (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "ISP" TEXT /* Internet Service Provider at the location */,
  "network_latency" REAL /* Network latency at the location (in milliseconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uptime_data" (
  "uptime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each uptime data point */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "uptime" REAL /* Uptime percentage */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the website (in milliseconds) */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code returned by the website */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed error message if the website is down */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uptime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uptime_data_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uptime_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, customer) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_websites" (
  "user_website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-website pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user for the website (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_websites_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_websites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website involved */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location involved */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., downtime, slowdown) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., uptime, response time) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "window_size" INTEGER /* Time window over which the threshold is calculated (in minutes) */,
  "alert_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency at which alerts should be triggered (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_thresholds_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_thresholds_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytic_data" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic data point */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., avg uptime, max response time) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the metric (in percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytic_data_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytic_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "model_data" TEXT /* Actual model data */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model making the prediction */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "prediction" REAL /* Prediction value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction (in percentage) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
